rationale: Inject TIMELINE_PLAY_INTERVAL_MS into the template so the client-side JS can read it without an extra API call.
implementation: Simple string replacement of the {{PLAY_INTERVAL_MS}} placeholder with the config value, falling back to 1500ms.
